description: Omio is a multimodal travel platform for searching, comparing, and booking trains, buses, flights, and ferries across many providers and countries. It also offers B2B travel solutions and conversational travel experiences through ChatGPT.
summary: Omio exposes a public ChatGPT-era integration surface consisting of an unauthenticated HTTP plugin API at https://omio.com/b2b-chatgpt-plugin (OpenAPI published) and a cataloged public MCP endpoint at https://llm-apps.omio.ai/chatgpt.
